{{CargoRelic
|name=Spirit Bead
|class_id=20215
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Legend has it that this gemstone originated in the heavenly pool of Kunlun Mountain, formed by natural spiritual energy. It was later acquired by the Deity Taiyi and became a rare treasure even for immortals!
|fame=14
|art=14
|fth=30
|civ=16
|tech=16
|ss1=Lottery Blue Orbs turn to Purple by +0.2%
|ss2=Lottery Blue Orbs turn to Purple by +0.4%
|ss3=Lottery Blue Orbs turn to Purple by +0.6%
|ss4=Lottery Blue Orbs turn to Purple by +0.6%
|ss7=Lottery Blue Orbs turn to Purple by +0.6%<br> (Awakened)
}}
